name: Requirement Analysis
template:
Analyze the following business requirement and provide clarity on scope, constraints, and deliverables:

Requirement: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Please provide:
1. Clear summary of the requirement
2. Key stakeholders involved
3. Success criteria
4. Potential risks and dependencies

name: Process Flow Analysis
template:
Create a detailed process flow analysis for:

Process: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Include:
1. Current state process steps
2. Bottlenecks and pain points
3. Improvement opportunities
4. Future state recommendations

name: Requirements Document
template:
Create a formal requirements specification for:

{{REQUIREMENT}}

Document structure:
1. Executive Summary
2. Business Requirements
3. Functional Requirements
4. Non-Functional Requirements
5. Acceptance Criteria
6. Dependencies and Assumptions

name: System Architecture Design
template:
Design a system architecture for:

System: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Provide:
1. Architecture diagram description
2. Core components and their responsibilities
3. Integration points
4. Scalability and performance considerations
5. Security architecture
6. Disaster recovery approach

name: Technology Stack Selection
description: Recommend technology stack for a solution
template:
Recommend a technology stack for the following solution:

Project: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Evaluate and recommend:
1. Backend framework/runtime
2. Frontend framework
3. Database solutions
4. Infrastructure and cloud platform
5. DevOps and CI/CD tools
6. Monitoring and logging solutions
7. Justification for each choice

name: Security Architecture Review
template:
Review the security architecture for:

System: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Analyze:
1. Authentication mechanisms
2. Authorization and access control
3. Data encryption (in transit and at rest)
4. Vulnerability assessment
5. Compliance requirements
6. Security testing strategy
7. Incident response plan

name: API Design
template:
Design a RESTful API for:

Feature: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Specify:
1. Endpoint paths and HTTP methods
2. Request/response schemas
3. Error handling and status codes
4. Authentication/authorization
5. Rate limiting strategy
6. Versioning approach
7. API documentation format

name: Code Review Checklist
template:
Create a code review checklist for:

Code/Feature: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Review criteria:
1. Code quality and style
2. Performance optimization
3. Error handling
4. Testing coverage
5. Security considerations
6. Documentation
7. Backward compatibility
8. Best practices alignment

name: Algorithm Implementation
template:
Implement a solution for the following algorithm problem:

Problem: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Provide:
1. Problem analysis and examples
2. Algorithm explanation
3. Pseudo-code
4. Full implementation code
5. Time and space complexity analysis
6. Edge cases handling
7. Test cases

name: Code Documentation
template:
Create comprehensive documentation for:

Code Module: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Include:
1. Module overview and purpose
2. Function/method descriptions
3. Parameters and return values
4. Usage examples
5. Dependencies
6. Performance considerations
7. Known limitations

name: Mobile App Feature Design
template:
Design a mobile app feature for:

Feature: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Provide:
1. User journey and wireflows
2. UI/UX specifications
3. Platform-specific considerations (iOS/Android)
4. Performance optimization
5. Offline functionality
6. Testing strategy
7. Analytics tracking plan

name: Mobile API Integration
template:
Design API integration for mobile app:

Integration: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Address:
1. Authentication handling
2. Network resilience
3. Data caching strategy
4. Offline support
5. Error handling
6. Security measures
7. Performance optimization (battery, data usage)

name: Test Plan Creation
template:
Create a test plan for:

Feature/System: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Include:
1. Testing scope and objectives
2. Test types (unit, integration, system, acceptance)
3. Test environment requirements
4. Testing schedule and resources
5. Entry and exit criteria
6. Risk assessment
7. Deliverables

name: Test Case Generation
template:
Generate test cases for:

Requirement: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Provide:
1. Positive test scenarios
2. Negative test scenarios
3. Edge case scenarios
4. Performance test cases
5. Security test cases
6. Detailed test steps
7. Expected results
8. Test data requirements

name: Automation Test Strategy
template:
Design test automation strategy for:

Application: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Define:
1. Automation scope and priorities
2. Test automation framework selection
3. Tool recommendations
4. Test automation architecture
5. Maintenance strategy
6. CI/CD integration
7. ROI analysis

name: Project Plan
template:
Create a project plan for:

Project: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Include:
1. Project scope and objectives
2. Work breakdown structure (WBS)
3. Timeline and milestones
4. Resource allocation
5. Risk management plan
6. Communication plan
7. Quality assurance approach
8. Budget estimation

name: Risk Management Plan
template:
Develop a risk management plan for:

Project/Initiative: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Address:
1. Risk identification
2. Risk analysis (probability and impact)
3. Risk prioritization
4. Mitigation strategies
5. Contingency plans
6. Risk monitoring approach
7. Escalation procedures

name: Stakeholder Communication Plan
template:
Create a stakeholder communication plan for:

Project: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Define:
1. Stakeholder identification and analysis
2. Communication objectives
3. Key messages
4. Communication channels
5. Frequency and schedule
6. Responsible parties
7. Feedback mechanisms

name: CI/CD Pipeline Design
template:
Design a CI/CD pipeline for:

Application: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Specify:
1. Build automation strategy
2. Testing stages in pipeline
3. Deployment strategy
4. Environment management
5. Monitoring and alerting
6. Rollback procedures
7. Infrastructure as Code approach

name: Infrastructure Architecture
template:
Design infrastructure for:

Application: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Include:
1. Cloud provider selection
2. Compute resources (VMs, containers, serverless)
3. Network architecture
4. Storage solutions
5. Load balancing strategy
6. Auto-scaling configuration
7. Disaster recovery setup

name: Monitoring & Observability
template:
Design monitoring and observability for:

System: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Address:
1. Metrics collection strategy
2. Log aggregation
3. Distributed tracing
4. Alerting strategy
5. Dashboards and visualization
6. SLA/SLO definitions
7. Incident response process

name: UI/UX Design Specification
template:
Create UI/UX design specifications for:

Feature/Product: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Include:
1. User personas and journey
2. Wireframes description
3. Visual design guidelines
4. Component specifications
5. Interaction patterns
6. Accessibility requirements
7. Responsive design approach

name: Design System Documentation
template:
Create design system documentation for:

Component/Pattern: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Document:
1. Component purpose and usage
2. Visual specifications
3. Interaction states
4. Code examples
5. Accessibility compliance
6. Do's and don'ts
7. Related components

name: Solution Proposal
template:
Create a solution proposal for:

Client Requirement: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Include:
1. Executive summary
2. Problem statement
3. Proposed solution overview
4. Implementation approach
5. Timeline and milestones
6. Investment and ROI
7. Success criteria
8. Appendices (tech specs, references)

name: Discovery Questions
template:
Generate discovery questions for:

Business Context: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Create questions that uncover:
1. Business objectives and challenges
2. Current state and pain points
3. Success metrics and desired outcomes
4. Timeline and budget
5. Stakeholders and decision makers
6. Technical requirements
7. Integration needs

name: ROI Analysis
template:
Conduct ROI analysis for:

Initiative/Solution: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Analyze:
1. Investment required (capital and operational)
2. Cost savings and revenue benefits
3. Payback period calculation
4. Financial projections (3-5 years)
5. Risk factors and assumptions
6. Comparison with alternatives
7. Executive summary

name: Product Requirements Document (PRD)
template:
Create a Product Requirements Document for:

Product/Feature: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Include:
1. Product vision and goals
2. Target users and personas
3. Problem statement
4. Feature requirements
5. Success metrics and KPIs
6. Roadmap and priorities
7. Technical constraints
8. Launch strategy

name: Competitive Analysis
template:
Conduct competitive analysis for:

Product/Market: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Analyze:
1. Direct and indirect competitors
2. Competitor features and positioning
3. Pricing strategy comparison
4. Market gaps and opportunities
5. Differentiation strategy
6. Threat assessment
7. Strategic recommendations

name: Feature Prioritization Matrix
template:
Create a feature prioritization matrix for:

Product Features: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Evaluate features based on:
1. User impact and value
2. Business impact and ROI
3. Implementation complexity
4. Technical risk
5. Dependencies
6. Resource availability
7. Strategic alignment

name: Bug Report Template
template:
Analyze and document the following issue:

Issue: {{REQUIREMENT}}

Provide in bug report format:
1. Title and severity level
2. Detailed description
3. Steps to reproduce
4. Expected vs actual behavior
5. Environment details
6. Screenshots/logs
7. Impact analysis
8. Suggested fix (if applicable)
